posts.author: GeorgeKonstam (George Konstam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

A number of improvements for Teams in monday.com:

  1. Control over what notifications Parent Teams get about Sub Teams
  2. Automations / Workflows to exist at Team level so adding/removing users or creating a new Team can be a trigger to then assign People to different Boards / Workspaces
  3. Add a Team (Dynamic) View

What are you trying to achieve

Better work management and control through Teams
